<think> The person is identified as a Scottish nobleman and pioneering aviator. I need to find who this nobleman is that is the father of James Alexander Douglas-Hamilton, Baron Selkirk of Douglas. I don't have enough information to directly identify the father, but I can look up who James Alexander Douglas-Hamilton's parents are and then find the Scottish nobleman father. </think>

<answer> The Scottish nobleman who is the father of James Alexander Douglas-Hamilton, Baron Selkirk of Douglas, is Archibald Douglas-Hamilton, 20th Earl of Selkirk (1851-1922).
